posts.author: rixcyshah (rixcyshah)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,
I’m exploring ways to enhance our CRM workflow in Monday.com. Specifically, I want to link digital membership cards (like Apple Wallet or Google Wallet passes) to contacts in the CRM, so that when a new member is added, they automatically receive a digital card. I’ve seen some third-party tools like PassKit or Zapier that might help, but I’m curious if anyone here has successfully implemented this integration directly or has suggestions for a smooth workflow. Any guidance, tips, or examples would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance for your help.
